title: Automate template when assigning a task by the (board creator), set that person as an Owner column of a board
excerpt: I have a template that has an Owner column to designate who owns each given task.  It’s typically going to be the person who created the board who will be assigned as the owner - and it’s typically that same person who c…

posts.author: mjbosko (Mike Bosko)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a template that has an Owner column to designate who owns each given task. It’s typically going to be the person who created the board who will be assigned as the owner - and it’s typically that same person who creates the task. Is there a way to automate this via A TEMPLATE? When a task is created, add the board owner’s name as Owner?

I created the template from a board I used a lot and staff asked me to share. Now, however, since I created an automation transferred to that template, it puts my name in the owner field when their new task is created - I’d like a way to change this in the template.

Not sure this makes sense?

posts.author: fifield21 (Carrie )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Mike,

Yes this can be done, leveraging API’s and middleware software. If you want to chat it up, here is my calendar- feel free to find a time to connect: Calendly - Carrie Fifield
